title: Offer Evaluation, Compensation, Negotiation, and Decision Quality · Independent Career Trial
summary: A different candidate, role family, location, access need, employment history, constraint, and hiring process requires an independent transfer of offer evaluation, compensation, negotiation, and decision quality into a changed evidence-based offer decision model. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of evidence-based offer decision model with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debuggin…
objectives: Request and verify a written offer, role, level, reporting line, location, schedule, start, compensation, benefits, contingencies, and decision date.
Compare base, variable pay, equity uncertainty, benefits, leave, hours, commute, equipment, learning, stability, risk, and personal constraints.
Build a source-dated occupation, location, level, and responsibility range while separating public data from this employer decision.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Commit to the mission model · Lab Written Offer
steps.instruction:
lab case — A verbal offer creates urgency while level, manager, total compensation, contingencies, schedule, intellectual property terms, and decision time remain unclear. The lab variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Request and verify a written offer, role, level, reporting line, location, schedule, start, compensation, benefits, contingencies, and decision date.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Commit to the mission model · Lab Written Offer.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for request and verify a written offer, role, level, reporting line, location, schedule, start, compensation, benefits, contingencies, and decision date. For Commit to the mission model · Lab Written Offer, keep Written Offer connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A verbal offer creates urgency while level, manager, total compensation, contingencies, schedule, intellectual property terms, and decision time remain unclear. The lab variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Request and verify a written offer, role, level, reporting line, location, schedule, start, compensation, benefits, contingencies, and decision date.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Written Offer condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: EEOC Employment Discrimination and AI for Workers — Controls awareness that automated recruiting, screening, assessment, promotion, and pay tools can implicate protected rights and accommodation needs.
